current_paradigm.summary: Vouch is a narrow commitment-backed payment coordination system for pre-arranged appointments and in-person agreements.
current_paradigm.core_invariant: both parties confirm presence within the confirmation window -> funds release; otherwise -> refund, void, or non-capture

must_preserve: Payer payment setup and payee payout setup are separate readiness tracks.
Stripe SDK calls remain isolated in lib/integrations/stripe.
Current Stripe PaymentIntent state is retrieved before settlement.

known_risks.description: Existing code may still reflect older role, fee, route, or readiness assumptions.
known_risks.mitigation: Use the updated contracts as source of truth and update implementation in the documented phase order.

known_risks.description: The fee policy is stated as max 5% of customer total or 500 cents and must be encoded precisely in lib/vouch/fees.ts tests.
known_risks.mitigation: Add focused fee tests before changing payment settlement behavior.
